guide.summary: You have 4 tools working for East Texas HVAC right now. Your phone is answered 24/7 — every call gets handled, every appointment gets booked, and you see everything on your dashboard. People who call but don't book get a follow-up automatically. Nothing falls through the cracks.
checklist: Forward your business line to (903) 555-0101 (or give out this number directly)
Call your AI number yourself to hear how it sounds
Log into your dashboard at bosssystems.co/client-dashboard.html with code HVAC-MIKE-01
Check your dashboard once a day to see who called
Text Boston (903-714-6162) if anything needs changing — same-day updates
Tell your team about the AI — they should know it's answering when they can't

stack_sections.title: Your AI Phone System
stack_sections.what_it_does: Answers calls 24/7, books appointments, handles emergency HVAC requests, quotes standard services
stack_sections.emergency: After-hours emergency requests get booked for first-available next morning. Tells caller to check breaker and thermostat settings while they wait.

stack_sections.title: Call Logging
stack_sections.what_it_does: After every call, logs the outcome — who called, what they needed, whether they booked, and any notes

stack_sections.title: Your Dashboard
stack_sections.what_it_does: See every call your AI handled — caller name, what they needed, whether they booked, full conversation

stack_sections.title: Automatic Follow-Ups
stack_sections.what_it_does: Automatically follows up with people who called but didn't book — texts them the next day to check if they still need help

field_tips: Summer is when you're busiest AND when phones ring most — your AI catches the calls you can't
Emergency calls at night are worth 2-3x a normal job — your AI books those while you sleep
Maintenance plan customers call to renew in spring — your AI handles renewal scheduling
When your techs are on roofs, they can't answer phones — that's exactly when the AI earns its keep
growth_tips: Ask every happy customer for a Google review — 5 stars is the #1 way HVAC companies get new customers
Maintenance plans are recurring revenue — offer $149/year for 2 tune-ups and priority scheduling
Partner with real estate agents — they need HVAC inspections for every closing
Post before/after photos of your work on Google Business Profile — it builds trust

results_expected.estimated_revenue_saved: $4,000-12,000/month in jobs that would have gone to voicemail

contact.name: Boston
contact.method: Text is fastest. Changes go live same day.

lessons.title: Getting the Most Out of Your AI Phone System
lessons.objective: Know exactly what your AI can and can't do, so you use it to its full potential
content: Your AI answers every call to East Texas HVAC — day, night, weekends, holidays. Here's how to make sure it's working as hard as possible for you.
**What it handles automatically:** 24/7 answering, appointment booking, emergency routing, service quoting, after-hours handling
**Services it knows:** AC repair, heating repair, duct cleaning, maintenance plans, new installations
**How to update it:** Text Boston at 903-714-6162. New services, new hours, vacation days, price changes — anything. Updates go live same day.
**The biggest win:** The calls that come in when you're on a job, on a roof, under a sink, or asleep. Those are the ones worth the most — and your AI catches every single one.

quiz.question: When should you update your AI's information?
options: Only when you first set it up
Whenever your hours, services, or pricing change
quiz.hint: Your AI only knows what it's been told. If something changes, text Boston.

lessons.first_step: Call your own AI number right now. Listen to how it sounds. If anything feels off, text Boston.

lessons.title: Reading Your Dashboard Like a Pro
lessons.objective: Understand every number on your dashboard so you can see exactly what your AI is doing for you
content: Your dashboard at bosssystems.co/client-dashboard.html shows every call your AI handled.
**What to look for daily:** New bookings (green), callback requests (yellow), general inquiries (blue). Each call shows the full conversation.
**After-hours calls:** These are gold. Check how many calls came in outside your normal hours — those would have gone to voicemail without the AI.
**Patterns to notice:** Which days are busiest? What time do most calls come in? What do people ask about most? This tells you where to focus your marketing.
**The number that matters most:** Booked appointments. That's revenue. Track it weekly and you'll see exactly what your AI is worth.

quiz.question: What's the most important number to track on your dashboard?
quiz.hint: Booked appointments = revenue. Everything else is context.

lessons.first_step: Log into your dashboard and check the last 7 days. Count the after-hours calls — those are jobs you would have missed.

lessons.title: Growing Your HVAC Business
lessons.objective: Specific strategies that work for hvac companies in small towns
content: **Peak season:** May through August. This is when your AI earns its keep — phones ring most when you're busiest.
**Average job value:** $400-2,500. Every missed call is that much revenue at risk.
**Why calls matter:** Every missed call during peak season is a potential $1,500 AC repair job going to your competitor
**Tip:** Summer is when you're busiest AND when phones ring most — your AI catches the calls you can't
**Tip:** Emergency calls at night are worth 2-3x a normal job — your AI books those while you sleep
**Tip:** Maintenance plan customers call to renew in spring — your AI handles renewal scheduling
**Tip:** When your techs are on roofs, they can't answer phones — that's exactly when the AI earns its keep

quiz.question: During peak season, what's the biggest risk for a hvac business?
quiz.hint: You can't answer the phone while you're on a job. That's exactly when your AI matters most.

lessons.first_step: Look at your dashboard for the last month. How many calls came in while you were on a job? That's your AI's value in real numbers.

lessons.title: Getting More Customers Without Spending More
lessons.objective: Free and low-cost ways to fill your schedule
content: Your AI handles the phones. Now let's fill them up with more calls.
**Strategy:** Ask every happy customer for a Google review — 5 stars is the #1 way HVAC companies get new customers
**Strategy:** Maintenance plans are recurring revenue — offer $149/year for 2 tune-ups and priority scheduling
**Strategy:** Partner with real estate agents — they need HVAC inspections for every closing
**Strategy:** Post before/after photos of your work on Google Business Profile — it builds trust
**The compound effect:** More reviews = more calls = more bookings = more reviews. Your AI handles the calls in the middle — you just need to start the cycle with great work and asking for reviews.

quiz.question: What's the #1 free way to get more customers?
quiz.hint: 5-star Google reviews are free and they work 24/7 — just like your AI.

lessons.first_step: Text your last 3 happy customers and ask for a Google review. Keep it simple: 'Hey [name], if you were happy with the work, would you mind leaving us a quick Google review? It really helps.'

lessons.title: Knowing Your Numbers
lessons.objective: Track the 3 numbers that tell you if your business is healthy
content: You don't need a spreadsheet or an accounting degree. Just track three things:
**1. What came in this week** — total revenue from all jobs
**2. What went out this week** — fuel, materials, insurance, your AI ($60/mo), everything
**3. What's left** — that's your profit. If it's growing, you're doing it right.
**Set aside 25-30% for taxes.** If you're a sole proprietor making over $1,000/quarter, you owe quarterly estimated taxes (April 15, June 15, September 15, January 15). Don't get surprised.

**Your AI shows you part of the picture:** Dashboard call volume tells you demand. If calls are up but revenue is flat, you're not converting. If calls are down but revenue is up, your average job value is growing.

quiz.question: How much should you set aside for taxes?
quiz.hint: 25-30% keeps you safe from a surprise tax bill. Pay quarterly.

lessons.first_step: Open your phone's notes app. Write down this week's revenue and expenses. Do this every Sunday night — 5 minutes.
